info.name: Amazon Neptune Data API
Gremlin
Amazon Neptune Execute a Gremlin Query via the Data API

items.docs: Executes a Gremlin query against the Neptune graph database using the Data API. The query is submitted as a JSON payload and results are returned synchronously.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Execution Plan for a Gremlin Query

items.docs: Executes a Gremlin explain query against the Neptune graph database. Returns the query execution plan without actually running the query against the data.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Profile a Gremlin Query Execution

items.docs: Executes a Gremlin profile query against the Neptune graph database. Returns the query execution plan along with actual runtime statistics including execution time and intermediate result counts.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Status of Gremlin Queries

items.docs: Gets the status of running and waiting Gremlin queries. Returns a list of active queries with their query IDs and statuses.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Status of a Specific Gremlin Query

params.name: queryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Gremlin query.

items.docs: Gets the status of a specific Gremlin query by its query ID.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Cancel a Running Gremlin Query

params.name: queryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the Gremlin query to cancel.

items.docs: Cancels a running Gremlin query by its query ID.

info.name: openCypher
Amazon Neptune Execute an OpenCypher Query via the Data API

items.docs: Executes an openCypher query against the Neptune property graph database using the Data API. Returns the results in JSON format.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Execution Plan for an OpenCypher Query

items.docs: Executes an openCypher explain query. Returns the query execution plan without actually running the query against the data.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Status of OpenCypher Queries

items.docs: Gets the status of running and waiting openCypher queries.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Status of a Specific OpenCypher Query

params.name: queryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the openCypher query.

items.docs: Gets the status of a specific openCypher query by its query ID.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Cancel a Running OpenCypher Query

params.name: queryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the openCypher query to cancel.

items.docs: Cancels a running openCypher query by its query ID.

info.name: SPARQL
Amazon Neptune Execute a SPARQL Query via the Data API

items.docs: Executes a SPARQL query against the Neptune RDF graph database using the Data API. Supports SELECT, ASK, CONSTRUCT, and DESCRIBE queries.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Status of SPARQL Queries

items.docs: Gets the status of running and waiting SPARQL queries.

info.name: Status
Amazon Neptune Get Neptune Engine Status

items.docs: Returns the status of the Neptune DB instance including engine version, cluster role, and instance health information.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get Property Graph Statistics

items.docs: Returns statistics for the property graph data stored in the Neptune database, including node and edge counts and label distributions.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Manage Property Graph Statistics

items.docs: Starts or deletes statistics generation for the property graph data.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get SPARQL RDF Statistics

items.docs: Returns statistics for the RDF data stored in the Neptune database, including triple counts and predicate distributions.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Manage SPARQL RDF Statistics

items.docs: Starts or deletes statistics generation for the RDF data.

info.name: Loader
Amazon Neptune List Bulk Loader Jobs

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of load IDs to return.

params.name: includeQueuedLoads
params.description: Whether to include queued loads in the response.

items.docs: Returns a list of Neptune bulk loader job IDs. Neptune tracks the most recent 1,024 bulk load jobs.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Start a Bulk Loader Job

items.docs: Initiates a bulk data loading job from Amazon S3 into the Neptune database. Supports CSV for property graphs and multiple RDF formats.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Status of a Bulk Loader Job

params.name: loadId
params.description: The unique identifier of the load job.

params.name: details
params.description: Whether to include detailed status information.

params.name: errors
params.description: Whether to include error details.

params.name: page
params.description: Error page number to retrieve.

params.name: errorsPerPage
params.description: Number of errors per page.

items.docs: Returns the status of a specific bulk loader job including overall progress and any error details.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Cancel a Bulk Loader Job

params.name: loadId
params.description: The unique identifier of the load job to cancel.

items.docs: Cancels an in-progress bulk loader job by its load ID.

info.name: Streams
Amazon Neptune Get Property Graph Change Stream Records

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return (1-100000, default 10).

params.name: iteratorType
params.description: The stream position to start reading from.

params.name: commitNum
params.description: The commit number to start from.

params.name: opNum
params.description: The operation sequence number within the commit.

items.docs: Gets a stream of change-log entries for property graph data. Each entry records a mutation (add, remove) made to the graph data.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get SPARQL RDF Change Stream Records

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return (1-100000, default 10).

params.name: iteratorType
params.description: The stream position to start reading from.

params.name: commitNum
params.description: The commit number to start from.

params.name: opNum
params.description: The operation sequence number within the commit.

items.docs: Gets a stream of change-log entries for RDF data. Each entry records a mutation (add, remove) made to the RDF triples.

info.name: ML
Amazon Neptune List ML Data Processing Jobs

params.name: maxItems
params.description: Maximum number of items to return (default 10, max 1024).

params.name: neptuneIamRoleArn
params.description: The ARN of the IAM role for Neptune access.

items.docs: Returns a list of active Neptune ML data processing job IDs.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Start an ML Data Processing Job

items.docs: Creates a new Neptune ML data processing job that prepares graph data for model training using Amazon SageMaker.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get ML Data Processing Job Status

params.name: jobId
params.description: The unique identifier of the data processing job.

params.name: neptuneIamRoleArn
params.description: The ARN of the IAM role for Neptune access.

items.docs: Returns the status of a Neptune ML data processing job.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Cancel an ML Data Processing Job

params.name: jobId
params.description: The unique identifier of the data processing job.

params.name: clean
params.description: Whether to delete all S3 artifacts when cancelling.

params.name: neptuneIamRoleArn
params.description: The ARN of the IAM role for Neptune access.

items.docs: Cancels a running Neptune ML data processing job.

info.name: Amazon Neptune List ML Model Training Jobs

items.docs: Returns a list of active Neptune ML model training job IDs.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Start an ML Model Training Job

items.docs: Creates a new Neptune ML model training job using Amazon SageMaker.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get ML Model Training Job Status

items.docs: Returns the status of a Neptune ML model training job.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Cancel an ML Model Training Job

items.docs: Cancels a running Neptune ML model training job.

info.name: Amazon Neptune List ML Model Transform Jobs

items.docs: Returns a list of active Neptune ML model transform job IDs.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Start an ML Model Transform Job

items.docs: Creates a new Neptune ML model transform job that generates model artifacts for inference.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get ML Model Transform Job Status

items.docs: Returns the status of a Neptune ML model transform job.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Cancel an ML Model Transform Job

items.docs: Cancels a running Neptune ML model transform job.

info.name: Amazon Neptune List ML Inference Endpoints

items.docs: Returns a list of active Neptune ML inference endpoint IDs.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Create an ML Inference Endpoint

items.docs: Creates a new Neptune ML inference endpoint backed by Amazon SageMaker.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get ML Inference Endpoint Status

items.docs: Returns the status of a Neptune ML inference endpoint.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Delete an ML Inference Endpoint

items.docs: Deletes a Neptune ML inference endpoint.
